## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for visible UI changes, or write `Not applicable`.

## Security And Compliance Impact

Describe any security, privacy, abuse, or legal/compliance impact, or write `Not applicable`.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] Screenshots inspected when UI changed
